items.title_en: Google tools for customizing searches
items.title_zh: Google 的定制化搜索工具
items.summary_en: Explains Google's tools for tailoring search results, including advanced operators and filters, helping power users prune noise and surface more relevant results.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Google 提供的定制化搜索工具，包括高级运算符与筛选器，帮助高阶用户减少噪音、快速找到更相关的结果。

items.title_en: DHS demanded Google surrender data on a Canadian man over anti-ICE posts
items.title_zh: DHS 要求 Google 交出一名加拿大男子的数据，因其反对 ICE 的帖子
items.summary_en: Held data requests show cross-border privacy and human rights considerations as government agencies seek information tied to anti-ICE posts. The case highlights the tension between law enforcement needs and user privacy, plus how tech platforms navigate jurisdictional demands.
items.summary_zh: 政府机构就反对 ICE 的帖子请求信息，体现跨境隐私与人权权衡，以及执法需要与用户隐私之间的张力。该事件也揭示了科技平台在跨辖区要求面前的合规与应对策略。

items.title_en: Making Julia as Fast as C++ (2019)
items.title_zh: 让 Julia 的速度赶上 C++（2019）
items.summary_en: The post argues that Julia can reach C++-level speeds in hot code paths with strategies like type-stable code, careful inlining, and aggressive use of the LLVM backend. It emphasizes that parity isn’t automatic and requires careful algorithmic design and memory management. Practical takeaways include profiling workflows and when to trust Julia for systems-level tasks.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为通过保持类型稳定、对内联的精细控制以及借助 LLVM 的优化，Julia 在热点路径上可以达到与 C++ 相近的性能。实现这种对等需要精心的算法设计、内存管理和代码风格。实用要点包括性能分析流程以及何时应信任 Julia 用于系统级任务。

items.title_en: Academic Research Skills for Claude Code
items.title_zh: Claude Code 的学术研究技能资源
items.summary_en: A repository offering best practices for academic research workflows when using Claude Code, covering literature reviews, citations, and reproducibility. It helps researchers leverage AI-assisted coding to improve rigor and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 这个代码库提供使用 Claude Code 时的学术研究工作流最佳实践，涵盖文献综述、引文管理与结果的可复现性。它有助于研究人员在 AI 辅助编程中提升研究严谨性与效率。

items.title_en: Building my own Vi text editor in BASIC
items.title_zh: 用 BASIC 构建自己的 Vi 文本编辑器
items.summary_en: A retro-project description of building a Vi-inspired text editor in BASIC. The write-up explores implementing modal commands, buffers, and screen output within a vintage toolchain, offering practical takeaways for retro computing enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 博主用 BASIC 构建了一个受 Vi 启发的文本编辑器，探讨在古老工具链中实现模式编辑、缓冲区和屏幕输出的可行性。该项目为复古计算爱好者提供了实际的实现经验与教训。

items.title_en: First tunnel element of the Fehmarnbelt Tunnel immersed
items.title_zh: 费姆恩贝尔特隧道首个隧道单元下沉完成
items.summary_en: The first tunnel element of the Fehmarnbelt fixed link has been lowered into place, marking a milestone in one of Europe’s largest infrastructure projects. The operation demonstrates precision engineering at scale and advances a cross‑Baltic rail and road corridor expected to boost regional freight and mobility.
items.summary_zh: 费姆恩贝尔特海底隧道的首个隧道单元已成功下沉，标志着全球最大规模基础设施项目之一的关键里程碑。这一作业展示了大规模精密工程，并将推动横跨波罗的海的铁路与公路走廊，提升区域货运与出行能力。

items.title_en: Show HN: PHP-fts – Full-text search engine in pure PHP, no extensions
items.title_zh: Show HN：PHP-fts——纯 PHP 实现的全文检索引擎，无需扩展
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces PHP-fts, a full-text search engine written entirely in PHP with no extensions required. It aims for quick embedding into PHP apps, offering a lightweight alternative when native extensions are unavailable, albeit with performance trade-offs to consider.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍了 PHP-fts——完全用 PHP 实现的全文检索引擎，无需任何扩展。它适合在无法安装本地扩展的环境中快速嵌入到 PHP 应用，但需权衡性能等取舍。

items.title_en: Agent-harness-kit scaffolding for multi-agent workflows (MCP, provider-agnostic)
items.title_zh: 面向多代理工作流的代理搭建套件（MCP，提供者无关）
items.summary_en: A scaffolding kit for multi-agent workflows standardizes how agents from different providers cooperate, slashing boilerplate and boosting interoperability for complex AI pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 一个面向多代理工作流的搭建套件，规范不同提供者的代理协作方式，显著减少样板代码并提升复杂 AI 流水线的互操作性。

items.title_en: GPT‑5.5 Instant
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant
items.summary_en: OpenAI positions GPT-5.5 Instant as an ultra-fast inference variant designed for near-instant responses. The speed boost could reshape pricing, deployment options, and expectations for real-time AI assistants.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.5 Instant，强调近乎即时的推理能力与低延迟。此版本的速度提升可能影响定价、部署选项以及对实时 AI 助手的期望。

items.title_en: 2-D Mathematical Curves
items.title_zh: 二维数学曲线
items.summary_en: An online collection explores 2-D mathematical curves with visuals and interactive examples, illustrating how simple equations create rich geometric shapes. It serves educators and practitioners in math, graphics, and computational geometry.
items.summary_zh: 该站点以直观的互动示例展示二维数学曲线及其性质，说明简单方程如何产生丰富的几何形态。内容适用于数学教育、计算图形与几何应用的爱好者与从业者。

items.title_en: Read Programming as Theory Building
items.title_zh: 把编程读作理论构建
items.summary_en: The piece reframes programming reading as a process of building theory about computation rather than merely absorbing techniques. It suggests combining reading with hands-on experimentation and reflective critique to advance underlying concepts. The takeaway is to treat code as a vehicle for theory and to design learning around that interplay.
items.summary_zh: 本文将编程相关的读物视作构建计算理论的过程，而非仅仅学习技巧。它建议将阅读与动手实验和反思性批评相结合，以推动潜在概念的发展。核心观点是把代码作为理论的载体，并围绕这一关系设计学习方法。

items.title_en: The Visible Zorker: Zork 3
items.title_zh: 可见的 Zorker：Zork 3
items.summary_en: The Visible Zorker explores Zork 3, highlighting classic interactive fiction and modern accessibility. It delves into the enduring appeal of Infocom's series and how contemporary projects keep old puzzles alive for new readers.
items.summary_zh: 对 Zork 3 的探索，聚焦经典互动小说与现代可及性。文章回顾 Infocom 系列的持久魅力，以及当代项目如何让老谜题在新读者中继续流传。

items.title_en: Show HN: nfsdiag – A NFS diagnostic application
items.title_zh: Show HN: nfsdiag - 一个 NFS 诊断应用
items.summary_en: nfsdiag is a new open-source tool for diagnosing NFS performance and configuration issues. It provides sysadmins with insights into file server problems, helping troubleshoot network storage reliably.
items.summary_zh: nfsdiag 是一个开源的 NFS 诊断工具，可用于排查性能与配置问题，为系统管理员提供对文件服务器问题的洞察，提升网络存储故障排查的可靠性。

items.title_en: Eight More '8-Bit Era' Microprocessors
items.title_zh: 再来八款 8 位时代微处理器
items.summary_en: A survey of eight additional 8-bit era microprocessors, detailing architecture quirks, instruction sets, and the role each played in the broader timeline of early computing.
items.summary_zh: 对另外八款 8 位时代微处理器进行综述，介绍它们的架构特点、指令集，以及在早期计算史中的作用。

items.title_en: LLMorphism: When humans come to see themselves as language models
items.title_zh: LLMorphism：当人们把自己视作语言模型
items.summary_en: A concept paper exploring how humans anthropomorphize language models, shaping self-perception and behavior. It discusses implications for UI design, trust, and the risk of mistaking language pattern for cognition.
items.summary_zh: 本论文探讨人们如何拟人化语言模型，从而影响自我认知与行为；讨论对界面设计、信任建立，以及将语言模式错当成认知的风险的影响。

items.title_en: OpenBSD Stories: The closest thing to cute kittens (OpenBSD/zaurus)
items.title_zh: OpenBSD 故事：最像可爱小猫的其实是 OpenBSD/zaurus
items.summary_en: OpenBSD/zaurus is highlighted in a light-hearted story about the quirks and charm of OpenBSD on the Zaurus handheld. It underscores OpenBSD’s culture of portability and tinkering, often celebrated in niche hardware communities.
items.summary_zh: 这篇轻松的故事聚焦于在 Zaurus 掌上设备上运行 OpenBSD 的趣味与挑战，彰显 OpenBSD 的可移植性与折腾文化。社区对这类小众硬件的热情也体现了自由与安全优先的精神。

items.title_en: SoundOff: Low-Cost Passive Ultrasound Tags
items.title_zh: SoundOff：低成本被动超声标签
items.summary_en: Introduces low-cost passive ultrasound tags for non-invasive sensing and tracking, enabling applications in healthcare, logistics, and smart environments.
items.summary_zh: 介绍低成本被动超声标签，用于非侵入式感测与追踪，适用于医疗、物流与智慧环境等场景；对成本与可用性有潜在影响。

items.title_en: How do I inform Windows that I'm writing a binary file?
items.title_zh: 如何让 Windows 知道我正在写二进制文件？
items.summary_en: Explains the difference between text and binary file handling on Windows and how to open files in binary mode to avoid newline translation and text processing. The post offers practical tips for ensuring binary data is written exactly as intended.
items.summary_zh: 解释 Windows 如何处理文本与二进制文件，以及如何以二进制模式打开文件以避免意外的换行符转译和文本处理。给出确保二进制数据按预期写入和读取的实用建议。

items.title_en: The Mathematical Dance Inside Plant Cells
items.title_zh: 植物细胞里的数学之舞
items.summary_en: Quanta Magazine explains how plant cells use geometry and signaling to regulate growth and pattern formation, supported by mathematical models of cell wall mechanics and turgor pressure. The article showcases how mathematical constraints and symmetry shape cellular behavior.
items.summary_zh: 《植物细胞里的数学之舞》介绍植物细胞如何借助几何与信号调控生长与模式形成，并辅以细胞壁力学和膨压等数学模型。文章突出约束与对称性在生物学中的作用，展示数学如何指引细胞行为。

items.title_en: Update on "Co-authored-by: Copilot" in commit messages
items.title_zh: 关于在提交信息中添加“Co-authored-by: Copilot”的更新
items.summary_en: In commit messages, a discussion about whether to include a 'Co-authored-by: Copilot' tag reflects evolving attribution practices for AI-assisted code, affecting licensing, credit, and contributor workflows in IDEs.
items.summary_zh: 关于在提交信息中是否保留 ‘Co-authored-by: Copilot’ 标签的讨论，折射出对 AI 辅助代码的归属与署名的新实践，影响许可、署名与协作流程。

items.title_en: The first microcomputer: The transfluxor-powered Arma Micro Computer from 1962
items.title_zh: 首台微型计算机：1962 年由转流器驱动的 Arma 微型计算机
items.summary_en: A historical look at the Arma Micro Computer (1962), powered by transfluxor technology, highlighting early experimentation with microcomputer concepts and the push toward smaller, more accessible computing.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1962年的 Arma 微型计算机——由转流器驱动，代表早期微型计算机在器件创新与小型化方面的探索。展示了当时的设计约束和对后续计算机架构的影响。

items.title_en: pgxbackup: Continuity Support for pgBackRest
items.title_zh: pgxbackup：pgBackRest 的连续性支持
items.summary_en: pgxbackup adds continuity support to pgBackRest, ensuring backup compatibility across PostgreSQL upgrades and patches. This reduces admin risk and improves predictability of data protection and recovery.
items.summary_zh: 该项目为 pgBackRest 提供连续性/兼容性支持，确保在 PostgreSQL 的升级与修补过程中备份保持可用。此举降低管理员风险，提升数据保护和恢复的可预测性。

items.title_en: Reviving the IBM Selectric Composer Fonts (2023)
items.title_zh: 复兴 IBM Selectric Composer 字体（2023）
items.summary_en: The piece documents reviving the IBM Selectric Composer fonts for modern use, blending historical typography with contemporary tooling. It reveals how digitized outlines and hinting capture the distinctive typesetting charm of the original.
items.summary_zh: 本文记录了将 IBM Selectric Composer 字体用于现代应用的复兴工作，融合了历史排版与当代工具。报道揭示了数字化轮廓和提示效果如何保留原始字体的独特排版魅力。文章强调在数字化形式中保留复古印刷美学的关注扩展。

items.title_en: Surfel-based global illumination on the web
items.title_zh: 基于 Surfels 的网页全局光照
items.summary_en: Demonstrates surfels-based global illumination running in the browser, enabling more realistic lighting for web apps without heavy offline rendering. This signals progress in WebGL/WebGPU and real-time graphics research.
items.summary_zh: 在浏览器中演示基于 Surfels 的全局光照方法，使网页应用能够实现更真实的光照效果，避免离线渲染的高成本。这体现了 WebGL/WebGPU 在实时图形领域的进展。

items.title_en: Mozilla says 271 vulnerabilities found by Mythos and "almost no false positives"
items.title_zh: Mozilla 称 Mythos 发现 271 个漏洞几乎没有误报
items.summary_en: Mozilla reports that Mythos found 271 vulnerabilities with almost no false positives, highlighting the tool's effectiveness for security testing. The claim signals confidence in automated vulnerability discovery and could influence how teams adopt AI-assisted testing.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 指出 Mythos 在安全测试中发现了 271 个漏洞，几乎没有误报，凸显该工具在自动化漏洞发现方面的有效性。这一说法可能影响团队对 AI 辅助测试的采用。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a new word game, Wordtrak
items.title_zh: Show HN：我开发了新词游戏 Wordtrak
items.summary_en: Wordtrak introduces a new word game with distinctive mechanics and an approachable online release. The post shares design decisions, core loop, and how it performs in practice, illustrating how indie developers ship tight, focused games.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：我开发了新词游戏 Wordtrak，具有独特的玩法机制并以简洁的在线形式上线。文章分享了设计决策、核心循环，以及在实际运行中的表现，展现独立开发者如何以极简聚焦推出作品。

items.title_en: Researchers print structural colour with an inkjet printer
items.title_zh: 研究人员用喷墨打印机实现结构色
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate printing structural color—colors arising from microstructure rather than pigments—using a standard inkjet printer. This could enable cheap, scalable color engineering for displays and cosmetics, with potential for environmentally friendly pigments.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示了用普通喷墨打印机实现结构色——颜色来自微结构而非颜料。此技术有望降低成本、提升尺度化颜色工程的应用，且可能更环保。

items.title_en: Shunting-Yard Animation
items.title_zh: Shunting-Yard 动画演示
items.summary_en: Animated visualization of the Shunting Yard algorithm helps learners grasp how rail cars are rearranged efficiently. It's a neat educational piece that could inspire more algorithm visualization projects.
items.summary_zh: 通过对 Shunting-Yard 算法的动画可视化，帮助学习者理解列车在轨道上的高效编排过程。这是一个有趣的教育作品，或许会促使更多算法可视化项目的开展。

items.title_en: Show HN: Agent-skills-eval – Test whether Agent Skills improve outputs
items.title_zh: Show HN：Agent-skills-eval——评估技能是否提升输出
items.summary_en: Agent-skills-eval provides a framework to test whether adding specific agent skills actually improves output quality across tasks. It benchmarks skill sets with controlled experiments and metrics, helping practitioners avoid assuming improvements without evidence.
items.summary_zh: Agent-skills-eval 提供一个框架，用以在受控实验中检验新增的代理技能是否确实提高输出质量。通过对比不同技能组的结果，帮助从业者避免凭直觉而非证据来判断改进效果。

items.title_en: How to make SSE token streams resumable, cancellable, and multi-device
items.title_zh: 如何让 SSE 令牌流具备可恢复、可取消和多设备支持
items.summary_en: This piece outlines practical patterns to make Server-Sent Events streams resumable, cancellable, and usable across multiple devices. It covers state management, signaling, and synchronization strategies that enable robust real-time streaming in web apps.
items.summary_zh: 本文概述了使 Server-Sent Events 流具备可恢复、可取消以及跨多设备使用的实用模式，涵盖状态管理、信号传输与同步策略，帮助 Web 应用实现更强的实时流能力。

items.title_en: Chindogu: Weird and Useless Japanese Inventions
items.title_zh: 珍道具：日本的怪异无用发明
items.summary_en: The collection highlights quirky, impractical gadgets from Japanese culture; each item embodies the spirit of Chindogu—ingenious but not useful in daily life—and offers cultural and design insights.
items.summary_zh: 这组收藏展示日本文化中的怪异、实用性很低的小发明；每个珍道具都体现了珍道具的精神——巧思但日常实用性有限，并提供文化与设计层面的洞见。

items.title_en: Underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time
items.title_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸对话
items.summary_en: An underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time, enabling researchers to analyze vocalization patterns and social interactions. The project advances marine bioacoustics and demonstrates sensor fusion in challenging environments.
items.summary_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸的交流，帮助研究者分析声纳模式和社交互动。该项目推动海洋生物声学研究，并展示在极端环境下的传感器融合能力。

items.title_en: Behavior-Oriented Concurrency for Python
items.title_zh: Python 的面向行为并发
items.summary_en: Introduces Behavior-Oriented Concurrency for Python (BocPy), a model that focuses on observable behaviors to structure parallel work rather than low-level threading. The approach aims to simplify Python concurrency and improve maintainability for real-world workloads.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 BocPy——一种以行为为核心来组织并发的 Python 框架或概念，意在简化并发编程并提升可维护性。探讨如何让实际工作负载受益于这种模型。

items.title_en: Roger Sweet, Creator of the He-Man Action Figure, Dies at 91
items.title_zh: He-Man 动作人偶设计师 Roger Sweet 去世，享年91岁
items.summary_en: Obituary honors Roger Sweet, who helped shape the iconic He-Man action figures and influenced 1980s toy design with his eye for character aesthetics and market appeal. His work contributed to the branding and licensing strategies that defined the era.
items.summary_zh: 讣告缅怀 Roger Sweet，他参与塑造了标志性的 He-Man 动作人偶，并在80年代玩具设计中以对角色美学与市场吸引力的敏锐洞察著称。其作品影响了当时的品牌与特许经营策略。

items.title_en: Removing fsync from our local storage engine
items.title_zh: 从本地存储引擎中移除 fsync
items.summary_en: Removing fsync from their storage engine yielded noticeable latency and throughput gains by avoiding synchronous flushes. The move trades some durability guarantees for performance, relying on crash-consistency strategies like write-ahead logs and careful recovery.
items.summary_zh: 通过移除存储引擎中的 fsync，显著降低了延迟并提升了吞吐量，避免了同步刷新带来的开销。这一改动在性能与数据耐久性之间作出权衡，依赖写前日志等崩溃一致性策略和细致的恢复流程。文中讨论了设计决策、风险以及在何种场景下该优化才有意义。

items.title_en: Modern jet engine turbines: each blade a single crystal (2015)
items.title_zh: 现代喷气发动机涡轮：每个叶片都是单晶（2015）
items.summary_en: A 2015 overview of single-crystal turbine blades, showing how this materials advancement improves high-temperature strength and efficiency in modern engines. Provides historical context for ongoing aerospace materials research.
items.summary_zh: 2015 年对单晶涡轮叶片的概述，指出这一材料进步提升了高温强度和发动机效率，为现代航空材料研究提供了历史背景。

items.title_en: The brave souls who bought a used, 340k-mile rental camper van
items.title_zh: 买下了一辆使用了 34 万英里里程的租赁房车的勇敢者
items.summary_en: A look at people who bought a used, 340k-mile rental camper van, exploring durability, cost-effectiveness, and the romance and risks of ultra-high-mileage adventures.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦购买了一辆里程高达 34 万英里的租赁房车的人们，探讨其耐用性、性价比，以及极高里程带来的浪漫与风险。

items.title_en: The Thinking Plant's Man (2025)
items.title_zh: Thinking Plant 的人（2025）
items.summary_en: A 2025 feature exploring the idea of intelligent plants and the researchers who study them, tracing the history of plant cognition.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年的一篇特写，探讨植物智慧及研究这一领域的人士，追溯植物认知的历史。

items.title_en: MPEG-2 Transport Stream Packaging for Media over QUIC Transport
items.title_zh: 通过 QUIC 传输的 MPEG-2 运输流打包
items.summary_en: Draft proposes packaging MPEG-2 Transport Streams over QUIC to streamline media delivery with lower latency and better security over HTTP/3, useful for streaming services.
items.summary_zh: 草案提出将 MPEG-2 运输流打包并通过 QUIC 传输，以在 HTTP/3 上实现更低时延和更好的安全性，适用于流媒体服务。

items.title_en: When is your birthday? The math behind hash collisions
items.title_zh: 你生日是哪天？哈希冲突背后的数学
items.summary_en: Examines the birthday paradox as it applies to hash collisions, explaining how collision probability grows with the number of samples and the size of the hash space. Keeps math intuitive, with practical implications for choosing hash sizes and understanding cryptographic risk.
items.summary_zh: 以生日悖论为线索解释哈希冲突的数学原理，讲清冲突概率随样本量和哈希空间大小的关系。给出对选择哈希位数和理解密码风险的直观提示。

items.title_en: Taxpayers May Be Eligible for Significant Tax Refunds – If They Act by July 10
items.title_zh: 7月10日前行动，纳税人可能获得大额退税
items.summary_en: Millions of taxpayers may be eligible for significant refunds due to IRS changes, but they need to act by July 10 to claim them. The post outlines who qualifies and practical steps to file or adjust returns. It also cautions about common pitfalls and scams.
items.summary_zh: 许多纳税人可能因为 IRS 调整而获得可观的退税，但需在7月10日前完成申报或调整。文章列出符合条件的人群及提交或修改申报的实用步骤，并警示常见风险。

items.title_en: Mickey Mouse is watching you: Disneyland deploys facial recognition
items.title_zh: 米奇正在盯着你：迪士尼乐园部署人脸识别
items.summary_en: Disneyland deploys facial recognition for park entry, raising privacy, consent, and data-use questions. The move highlights the tension between security and civil liberties in public spaces and may influence policy debates and guest expectations.
items.summary_zh: 迪士尼乐园在入园时部署人脸识别，带来隐私、同意与数据使用方面的问题。此举凸显公共空间安保与公民自由之间的张力，可能影响相关政策讨论和游客预期。

items.title_en: Gaps in national food production, worldwide
items.title_zh: 全球粮食产量的缺口
items.summary_en: Global gaps between national food production and demand reveal vulnerabilities to climate shocks, trade disruptions, and population growth.
items.summary_zh: 全球范围内的粮食产量与需求之间存在缺口，受气候变化、贸易中断与人口增长等因素影响，暴露出全球粮食安全的脆弱性。文章讨论通过数据、政策和农业科技投资来缩小产量差距、提升韧性。

items.title_en: Collaborative Editing in CodeMirror (2020)
items.title_zh: CodeMirror 的协作编辑
items.summary_en: CodeMirror's collaborative editing approach explores real-time co-editing in a lightweight editor, tackling conflict resolution and latency without heavy backend infrastructure. It offers practical patterns for embedding collaborative features in web IDEs.
items.summary_zh: CodeMirror 的协作编辑方案探讨在轻量编辑器中实现实时协作的可行性，聚焦冲突解决与低延迟等挑战。为在浏览器中嵌入协同编辑提供了可操作的架构模式与 UX 启示。

items.title_en: I completed 100 Days of Java over 5 years and mapped the journey as a graph
items.title_zh: 我用五年完成了 100 天 Java 学习，并将过程绘成图
items.summary_en: A developer's 100 Days of Java journey spans five years, visualized as a graph to reveal learning patterns, consistency, and turning points. The post offers takeaways on deliberate practice and long-term skill growth.
items.summary_zh: 一名开发者的 100 天 Java 学习之旅横跨五年，并绘制成图表以揭示学习节奏、持续性与关键转折。文章提供关于有计划练习与长期成长的经验教训。

items.title_en: Transformers Are Inherently Succinct (2025)
items.title_zh: Transformer 本质上是简洁的
items.summary_en: New work argues that transformers encode information succinctly, with implications for model efficiency, pruning, and interpretability. The findings suggest that more compact representations could enable faster inference and easier analysis without sacrificing performance.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究认为 Transformer 本质上以简洁表征信息，对模型效率、剪枝与可解释性具有潜在影响。研究结果暗示更紧凑的表征或许让推理更快、分析更易进行，同时不显著降低性能。

items.title_en: The first photo published in a newspaper, in 1848 (2023)
items.title_zh: 报纸上刊登的第一张照片
items.summary_en: A historical note about the first photograph published in a newspaper marks a milestone in media technology. It illustrates the leap from early photographic processes to modern image-centric journalism and information sharing. The piece situates this moment in the broader history of visual communication.
items.summary_zh: 关于第一张在报纸上刊登的照片，这一历史性时刻标志着媒体技术的里程碑。它展现了从早期摄影工艺到如今以图像为核心的新闻与信息传播的跃迁，成为视觉传播史的重要节点。

items.title_en: Building the TD4 4-Bit CPU
items.title_zh: TD4 四位 CPU 的构建
items.summary_en: Hands-on overview of building the TD4 4-bit CPU, covering the architecture, instruction set, and lessons for learning electronics and computer design.
items.summary_zh: 动手概览 TD4 四位 CPU 的架构与指令集，并讨论在学习电子学与计算机设计过程中的实践收获。

items.title_en: Fun with polynomials and linear algebra; or, slight abstract nonsense
items.title_zh: 多项式与线性代数的乐趣；或者，些许抽象的无厘头
items.summary_en: Explores playful connections between polynomials and linear algebra, highlighting conceptual parallels and intuitive insights rather than heavy formalism. The piece uses light humor to illuminate how algebraic structures arise in solving equations.
items.summary_zh: 以幽默笔触将多项式与线性代数的关系揭示出来，强调直观理解胜过繁琐推导。文章通过轻松风格展示代数结构在求解方程中的应用，提升对计算中数学直觉的理解。

items.title_en: Infrasound waves stop kitchen fires, but can they replace sprinklers?
items.title_zh: 低频声波能否替代喷淋系统？
items.summary_en: A startup claims infrasound waves can suppress kitchen fires, potentially replacing sprinklers; experts express skepticism about effectiveness, safety, and scalability. The topic underscores the long-standing challenge of reliable fire suppression tech.
items.summary_zh: 一家初创公司声称低频声波可扑灭厨房火灾，理论上或可替代喷淋系统；专家对效果、安全性与普适性持怀疑态度。此话题凸显了长期以来对可靠火灾抑制技术的挑战。

items.title_en: sRGB profile comparison
items.title_zh: sRGB 配色档案对比
items.summary_en: Examines how different sRGB color profiles affect color accuracy across devices and workflows. The analysis guides photographers, designers, and developers in choosing profiles aligned with their calibration and output needs. Practical tips help avoid color surprises in web and print.
items.summary_zh: 探讨不同的 sRGB 配色档案如何影响设备间和工作流中的色彩准确性。分析为摄影师、设计师与开发者在校准与输出需求之间做出更合适的档案选择提供指导，实用建议可避免网页与印刷中的色彩差异。

items.title_en: The Road to a Billion-Token Context
items.title_zh: The Road to a Billion-Token Context
items.summary_en: The Road to a Billion-Token Context explores the trajectory toward ultra-long context in language models, discussing memory, efficiency, and the impact on reasoning and retrieval tasks.
items.summary_zh: 十亿令牌上下文之路聚焦语言模型走向超长上下文的趋势，讨论记忆、效率以及对推理与检索任务的影响。

items.title_en: Digging into Drama at the Document Foundation
items.title_zh: 深入 Document Foundation 的风波
items.summary_en: An exploration of governance friction and internal drama at the Document Foundation, the umbrella organization behind LibreOffice. The piece analyzes how organizational tensions affect development priorities, contributor morale, and the project’s long-term health.
items.summary_zh: 对 LibreOffice 背后机构 Document Foundation 的治理摩擦与内部风波进行了深入分析，探讨组织紧张关系如何影响开发优先级、贡献者士气及项目的长期健康。

items.title_en: Komai: a fine Matrix chat app you can get to love
items.title_zh: Komai：一个你会爱上的 Matrix 聊天应用
items.summary_en: Komai presents a polished Matrix-based chat experience that could win over users who value open standards and interoperability. The review highlights the app’s design polish, UX, and potential to broaden Matrix adoption.
items.summary_zh: Komai 提供了一个精致的基于 Matrix 的聊天体验，可能吸引重视开放标准与互操作性的用户。文章重点评价其设计与用户体验，以及对扩大 Matrix 使用的潜力。

items.title_en: Pulitzer Prize Winner in International Reporting
items.title_zh: 国际报道普利策奖得主
items.summary_en: Pulitzer Prize winners in International Reporting were recognized for their in-depth global investigations, highlighting critical issues through on-the-ground reporting. The prize underscores the enduring value of rigorous, overseas journalism in an era of rapid misinformation.
items.summary_zh: 国际报道类普利策奖获得者因深入的全球调查而获奖，通过前线报道揭示关键议题。此奖项凸显在信息快速扩散的时代，扎实的海外新闻报道仍具重要价值。

items.title_en: DAG Workflow Engine
items.title_zh: DAG 工作流引擎 Daisy-DAG
items.summary_en: Daisy-DAG is a graph-based workflow engine for orchestrating tasks with dependencies, enabling parallel execution and pluggable backends. It targets scalable automation pipelines for data and infrastructure workloads.
items.summary_zh: Daisy-DAG 是一个基于有向无环图的工作流引擎，用于按依赖关系编排任务，支持并行执行和可替换的后端。目标是在数据与基础设施工作负载中提供可扩展的自动化管线。

items.title_en: Why I Created phpc.tv
items.title_zh: 为什么我创建了 phpc.tv
items.summary_en: Explains the motivation behind phpc.tv, a resource aimed at PHP developers—what problem it solves and how it helps the community. It emphasizes sharing knowledge, hosting tutorials, and building a collective learning space.
items.summary_zh: 解释了创建 phpc.tv 的初衷——一个面向 PHP 开发者的资源，解决什么问题以及如何帮助社区。强调知识分享、教程资源和共同学习空间的建设。

items.title_en: US will start revoking passports for parents who owe child support
items.title_zh: 美国将撤销拖欠子女抚养费者的护照
items.summary_en: The policy expands passport revocation for nonpayment of child support, aiming to enforce financial obligations. It raises questions about due process, potential hardship, and the data systems needed to enforce it.
items.summary_zh: 该政策扩大对拖欠子女抚养费者的护照撤销范围，旨在加强执行义务。但也引发关于程序正义、潜在困难，以及执行所需数据系统的问题探讨。

items.title_en: Simple Meta-Harness on Islo.dev
items.title_zh: Islo.dev 上的简易元控件
items.summary_en: Describes a lightweight meta-harness on Islo.dev for orchestrating experiments and workflows with minimal boilerplate. The approach emphasizes reproducibility, portability, and easier experimentation in ML or data pipelines. It's pitched as a simple, practical tool rather than a full framework.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Islo.dev 上的一个简易元控件，用于最小化样板代码地编排实验与工作流。该方法强调可重复性、可移植性，方便在机器学习或数据管道中的实验迭代，定位为实用而非完整框架。

items.title_zh: dBase：1979–2026 的演变
items.summary_en: A historical overview of dBase from its 1979 origins through 2026, tracing its influence on desktop databases, early software ecosystems, and how its design choices foreshadowed modern lightweight data management.
items.summary_zh: 对 dBase 自 1979 年起至 2026 年的演变进行回顾，追踪其对桌面数据库与早期软件生态的影响，以及其设计选择对现代轻量级数据管理的启示。

items.title_en: The people preserving the scientific practice of bird banding
items.title_zh: 守护鸟类环志科学实践的人们
items.summary_en: Ontario bird banding communities keep a long-running scientific practice alive, collecting migration data through careful tagging and observation.
items.summary_zh: 安大略省的鸟类环志社群维持着一项长期科学实践，通过细致的标记和观察收集迁徙数据。文章聚焦志愿者与研究者如何维持田野方法、培养新参与者，以及数据质量在生态研究中的重要性。

items.title_en: I caught the car
items.title_zh: 我追上了那辆车
items.summary_en: A personal reflection using the phrase 'I caught the car' to illustrate a decisive moment or opportunity in life or work.
items.summary_zh: 一篇个人随笔，以“我追上了那辆车”为隐喻，描绘生命或工作中一个决定性的瞬间。

items.title_en: Finding the differences in a series of power supplies
items.title_zh: 在一系列电源中找出差异
items.summary_en: An in-depth PSU comparison shows how regulation, ripple, efficiency, and protections vary across models. The analysis demonstrates robust testing practices that reveal real-world differences, helping builders and enthusiasts choose safer, more reliable power supplies.
items.summary_zh: 对一系列电源进行逐项测试并对比，揭示了调压、纹波、效率与保护功能等方面的差异。该分析展示了系统化测试的重要性，帮助选购者判断电源的可靠性和安全性。

items.title_en: Non-determinism is an issue with patching CVEs
items.title_zh: 修补 CVE 时的非确定性问题
items.summary_en: Non-deterministic behavior in patch deployment can cause inconsistent CVE remediation across systems, complicating verification and rollback. The piece suggests deterministic patching pipelines, reproducible builds, and thorough testing to improve remediation consistency.
items.summary_zh: 在打补丁的过程中，非确定性会导致不同系统的修补效果不一致，增加验证和回滚的难度。文章建议建立可重复的补丁流程、使用可重现构建和严格测试来提升修复的一致性。

items.title_en: First, the FBI Searched Her Home. Then, She Won a Pulitzer.
items.title_zh: 先是 FBI 搜查她的家，随后她赢得普利策奖
items.summary_en: Profile of a journalist who faced an FBI search of her home before winning a Pulitzer, illustrating tensions between investigation reporting, government scrutiny, and press freedom.
items.summary_zh: 报道讲述一名记者在普利策奖颁发前遭遇 FBI 上门搜查的经历，揭示调查报道、政府监督与新闻自由之间的紧张关系。

items.title_en: Show HN: Countries where you can leave your MacBook at a random coffee shop
items.title_zh: Show HN：可以在随机咖啡馆把 MacBook 放着不带走的国家
items.summary_en: A project mapping safety and social norms for leaving laptops unattended in public spaces, useful for travelers and digital nomads. The data helps assess risk by country and informs practical decisions about where to work.
items.summary_zh: 一个映射在公共场所无监督放置笔记本电脑时的安全性与社交习惯的项目，方便旅行者和数字游民参考。数据帮助按国家评估风险，并为选择咖啡店工作环境提供决策依据。

items.title_en: Speedup in Lattice Boltzmann Cylinder Flow
items.title_zh: 在圆柱流动中的格子玻尔兹曼法实现37倍加速
items.summary_en: Researchers report a 37x speedup for lattice Boltzmann simulations of flow around a cylinder, enabling faster computational fluid dynamics studies. The work showcases advances in parallelization and solver efficiency for CFD workloads.
items.summary_zh: 在圆柱绕流的格子玻尔兹曼法数值模拟中实现了约37倍加速，使计算流体力学研究更高效。这项工作体现了并行化和求解器效率方面的显著进展。

items.title_en: Ads on Apple Maps
items.title_zh: Apple Maps 广告
items.summary_en: Apple is rolling out ads in Apple Maps, enabling businesses to place location-based promotions within search results and map views. The move raises questions about monetization, privacy controls, and potential impact on local discovery and user experience.
items.summary_zh: 苹果地图将加入广告，允许商家在本地搜索结果和地图视图中投放定向广告。该举措引发对商业化、隐私保护以及对用户体验和本地信息发现的潜在影响的讨论。

items.title_en: How Fast Does Claude, Acting as a User Space IP Stack, Respond to Pings?
items.title_zh: Claude 作为用户空间 IP 堆栈对 Ping 的响应有多快？
items.summary_en: The post investigates Claude's latency when acting as a user-space IP stack that responds to ICMP ping, highlighting practical limits and overheads of AI-assisted networking tasks.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨在将 Claude 作为用户空间 IP 堆栈对 ICMP Ping 做出响应时的延迟，揭示 AI 辅助网络任务的实际边界与开销。

items.title_en: My first in-prod corrupted hard drive problem
items.title_zh: 我遇到的第一起生产环境中损坏的硬盘问题
items.summary_en: An engineer recounts their first in-production hard drive corruption, detailing the failover steps, data integrity checks, and lessons learned about backups, monitoring, and hot-swaps. The post emphasizes the importance of early detection, robust disaster recovery plans, and practicing hardware failure scenarios.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在生产环境中遇到的首次硬盘损坏案例，描述故障诊断、数据完整性校验与接管流程。强调及时发现、完善备份与热插拔、以及演练灾难恢复的要点。

items.title_en: Tools in the Grass: Raising the next generation of crafts person
items.title_zh: 在草地上的工具：培养下一代工匠
items.summary_en: Tools in the Grass explores nurturing the next generation of craftsmen, emphasizing practical tool use, mentorship, and hands-on woodworking education. It argues that traditional crafts sustain innovation and job skills.
items.summary_zh: 《在草地上的工具》聚焦培养下一代工匠，强调动手工具运用、导师制与实作木工教育的重要性。文章主张传统手艺能促进创新与职业技能的培养。

items.title_en: Show HN: I wrote a flight simulator in my own programming language
items.title_zh: Show HN：我用自创编程语言写了一个飞行模拟器
items.summary_en: Show HN: I wrote a flight simulator in my own programming language. The project showcases how language design choices affect a domain-specific tool and demonstrates the feasibility of building a complex simulator in a self-made language.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：我用自创编程语言写了一个飞行模拟器。该项目展示了语言设计在域特定工具中的影响，并证明用自制语言实现复杂仿真是可行的。

items.title_en: Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) and Quantum Cryptography (QC)
items.title_zh: 量子密钥分发与量子密码学
items.summary_en: A concise overview clarifies what QKD and QC each offer. QKD enables information-theoretically secure key exchange, while QC uses quantum algorithms to strengthen cryptography. The distinction helps planners map post-quantum security strategies.
items.summary_zh: 一段简要说明区分 QKD 与 QC 的要点：QKD 提供信息论层面的安全密钥交换，而 QC 则用量子算法强化密码学。这个区分帮助决策者规划后量子时代的安全策略。

items.title_en: Why is Cloudflare protecting the DDoS'er (beamed.st) attacking Ubuntu servers?
items.title_zh: 为何 Cloudflare 要保护攻击 Ubuntu 服务器的 DDoS 者 beamed.st？
items.summary_en: A discussion questions Cloudflare's anti-abuse decisions when shielding beamed.st, a site linked to DDoS activity against Ubuntu servers. It highlights the tension between blocking abuse and ensuring access for legitimate research and debugging.
items.summary_zh: 关于 Cloudflare 对 beamed.st 这类攻击者网站的保护，引发对滥用处理、反滭用策略及取舍的讨论。此事暴露了网络防护在保持可访问性与防止滥用之间的困难。

items.title_en: The Frog for Whom the Bell Tolls
items.title_zh: 这只青蛙为钟鸣而鸣
items.summary_en: A reflective piece uses a frog metaphor to illuminate a contemporary tech topic.
items.summary_zh: 这篇反思文章用青蛙隐喻来探讨一个当代科技议题。

items.title_en: Inventing Cyrillic (2024)
items.title_zh: 西里尔字母的诞生
items.summary_en: The article traces the origins of the Cyrillic script in the medieval Slavic world, highlighting its Bulgarian roots and Greek influences that enabled widespread literacy in Eastern Europe. It explains how Cyrillic shaped liturgy, culture, and modern languages across the region.
items.summary_zh: 本文追溯西里尔字母在中世纪斯拉夫世界的起源，强调其在保加利亚的根源以及希腊影响，推动了东欧的广泛读写能力。西里尔字母的形成深刻影响了祈祷仪式、文化及现代区域语言。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mochi.js: bun-native high-fidelity browser automation library
items.title_zh: Show HN：Mochi.js：bun 原生高保真浏览器自动化库
items.summary_en: Mochi.js is a bun-native high-fidelity browser automation library, enabling fast, reliable browser automation without Node.js. The post explains its design goals and potential use cases in testing and automation.
items.summary_zh: Mochi.js 是一个 bun 原生的高保真浏览器自动化库，旨在在无需 Node.js 的情况下实现快速稳定的浏览器自动化。文中介绍了设计目标与在测试与自动化场景的潜在用例。

items.title_en: Our Continuation of MkDocs
items.title_zh: MkDocs 的延续计划
items.summary_en: ProperDocs discusses continuing MkDocs development, signaling ongoing momentum for docs tooling in the static site ecosystem. The post outlines goals, compatibility considerations, and potential features for a maintained MkDocs path.
items.summary_zh: ProperDocs 讨论对 MkDocs 的延续开发，表明静态站点文档工具生态仍在活跃。文中概述了目标、兼容性考量以及对持续维护的 MkDocs 路线可能的新特性。

items.title_en: Los Alamos and the long path to detecting neutrinos
items.title_zh: 洛斯阿拉莫斯与探测中微子之漫长征程
items.summary_en: The piece chronicles Los Alamos’ long journey in neutrino detection, illustrating how detecting these elusive particles required decades of ingenuity and large-scale experiments. Neutrinos offer deep insights into astrophysics and fundamental physics, underpinning many modern discoveries.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾洛斯阿拉莫斯在中微子探测方面漫长的探索，展示了通过数十年的创新和大规模实验来捕捉这类微粒的挑战。中微子为天体物理与基础物理提供深刻见解，是现代诸多发现的基础。

items.title_en: Urban Birds Are Rising Earlier Because of Traffic Noise (2013)
items.title_zh: 城市鸟类在交通噪声中更早鸣叫（2013）
items.summary_en: Urban birds sing earlier in noisy cities, a phenomenon linked to traffic noise and urbanization; the piece discusses ecological impact and potential mitigation in city planning.
items.summary_zh: 城市鸟类在交通噪声中更早鸣叫，与城市化密切相关的现象。文章探讨生态影响及在城市规划中缓解噪声的思路。

items.title_en: Jonathan Swift's Last Joke
items.title_zh: 乔纳森·斯威夫特的最后一个玩笑
items.summary_en: Jonathan Swift's Last Joke uses literary analysis to explore how Swift's satire remains sharp and timely, offering insights into the role of humor in social critique. The piece connects his final gambit to broader themes about power and human folly.
items.summary_zh: 《乔纳森·斯威夫特的最后一个玩笑》通过文学分析探讨斯威夫特的讽刺如何仍然锋利与及时，引出幽默在社会批评中的作用。文章将其最终机智与对权力与人类愚昧的更广泛主题联系起来。

items.title_en: Homebridge 2.0 is here, and it speaks Matter
items.title_zh: Homebridge 2.0 来了，它支持 Matter
items.summary_en: Homebridge 2.0 adds Matter compatibility, enabling non-Matter devices to work with Matter ecosystems through bridging. It expands smart home interoperability and reduces vendor lock-in, while raising security considerations.
items.summary_zh: Homebridge 2.0 增添 Matter 兼容性，通过桥接让非 Matter 设备进入 Matter 生态，提升智能家居的互操作性并降低厂商锁定，但也带来安全性方面的新考量。

items.title_en: Sparse Cholesky Elimination Tree
items.title_zh: 稀疏 Cholesky 消去树
items.summary_en: Explores elimination trees for sparse Cholesky factorization, detailing data structures and algorithmic ideas to reduce fill-in and memory usage in sparse linear solvers. A practical read for numerical linear algebra practitioners.
items.summary_zh: 介绍稀疏 Cholesky 的消去树（ETree），讲解用于减少填充和内存用量的数据结构与算法思想，面向稀疏线性求解器的数值线代工作者。

items.title_en: ADT says customer data stolen in cyber intrusion
items.title_zh: ADT：客户数据在网络入侵中被窃取
items.summary_en: ADT confirms a cyber intrusion with customer data theft, highlighting ongoing security risks faced by consumer-security providers. The breach underlines the need for strong encryption, credential protection, and prompt incident response.
items.summary_zh: ADT 确认发生网络入侵，部分客户数据被窃取，凸显家居安防等领域的数据安全风险。事件凸显需要强加密、凭证保护与快速响应能力来提升信任。

items.title_en: Cordouan Lighthouse
items.title_zh: 科杜昂灯塔
items.summary_en: Cordouan Lighthouse stands at the mouth of the Gironde estuary as one of France’s oldest and architecturally distinctive lighthouses. Its construction and upkeep illustrate the evolution of maritime signaling and state power.
items.summary_zh: 科杜昂灯塔位于吉伦特河口，是法国最古老且建筑风格独特的灯塔之一。其建造与维护反映了航海信号技术与国家权力的演变。

items.title_en: Claude Code CVE-2026-39861:sandbox escape via symlink
items.title_zh: Claude Code CVE-2026-39861：通过符号链接实现的沙箱逃逸
items.summary_en: A vulnerability in Claude Code allows sandbox escape via a symlink, exposing potential bypass of sandboxed execution. The advisory lists affected versions and mitigations; users should patch or disable affected features until fixed.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 存在通过符号链接实现沙箱逃逸的漏洞（CVE-2026-39861），可能使受限执行环境被突破。公告列出受影响版本及缓解措施，建议尽快打补丁或在修复前禁用相关功能。

items.title_en: Google is discontinuing its free web search index for developers
items.title_zh: 谷歌停止向开发者提供免费网页搜索索引
items.summary_en: Google is ending free access to its web search index for developers, pushing developers toward paid APIs or alternative indexing solutions. The move affects tooling, SEO, and app features that relied on free indexing, potentially driving developers to consolidating services or reevaluating data strategies.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌停止向开发者提供免费网页搜索索引，促使开发者转向付费 API 或其他索引方案。这一举措影响依赖免费索引的工具、SEO 与应用功能，可能促使开发者调整数据策略和服务整合。

items.title_en: Stitch together lots of little HTML pages with navigations for interactions
items.title_zh: 用大量小型 HTML 页面拼接出带导航的交互体验
items.summary_en: Discusses assembling complex interactions by linking many small HTML pages rather than a single monolith. Emphasizes modularity, maintainability, and predictable behavior for simple demos or learning projects.
items.summary_zh: 通过将复杂交互拆分为多张小型 HTML 页面并设置导航来实现，强调模块化、可维护性和可预测性，适用于简单演示或学习原型。

items.title_en: Colored Shadow Penumbra
items.title_zh: 彩色阴影半影
items.summary_en: A design-focused exploration of colored shadow penumbra, blending optics, rendering, and perhaps creative coding. The piece invites readers to think about how colored lighting and layered shadows impact perception and UI aesthetics.
items.summary_zh: 这篇以彩色阴影为主题的设计论述，结合光学与渲染及创意编码的思考，讨论有色光照与分层阴影如何影响视觉感知与界面美感。

items.title_en: Usage-based pricing killing your vibe, here's how to roll your own local AI
items.title_zh: 基于使用量定价毁坏体验，教你搭建本地 AI
items.summary_en: The article argues that usage-based pricing for cloud AI hurts user experience and costs, offering a DIY path to run local AI agents. It covers practical steps, hardware considerations, and privacy advantages of keeping models on premises.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出云端 AI 的基于使用量定价会损害用户体验与增加成本，提出自建本地 AI 代理的可行路径。内容包括实际实现步骤、硬件考量以及在本地运行模型带来的隐私优势。

items.title_en: The context window has been shattered: Subquadratic debuts a 12M token window
items.title_zh: Subquadratic 公布 12M token 的上下文窗口
items.summary_en: Subquadratic debuts a 12M token context window, enabling long-context processing beyond standard transformer limits. The development could impact training efficiency and long-document understanding in future LLMs.
items.summary_zh: Subquadratic 公布了 12M token 的上下文窗口，突破了标准 Transformer 的上下文容量限制。此进展对未来大模型在长文本处理、训练效率和延展能力方面具有重要影响。

items.title_en: Oil-price bets ahead of Iran war news totalled $7B, reporting shows
items.title_zh: 在伊朗战争消息面前的油价赌注高达七亿美元
items.summary_en: Oil price bets ahead of potential Iran war news totaled around $7 billion, signaling traders' expectations of supply risk and geopolitical risk premiums. The figure underlines how geopolitics can rapidly influence energy markets and hedging strategies.
items.summary_zh: 在伊朗可能爆发冲突前，油价赌注总额大约为70亿美元，反映交易员对供应风险和地缘风险溢价的预期。这一数字凸显地缘政治如何迅速影响能源市场和对冲策略。

items.title_en: Aids Creeps Back in Parts of Zambia, a Year After U.S. Cuts to HIV Assistance
items.title_zh: 赞比亚在美国 HIV 援助削减后部分地区艾滋病再度蔓延
items.summary_en: After US cuts to HIV aid, certain regions of Zambia see a relapse in AIDS-related health challenges, impacting treatment access and health outcomes. The report highlights disruptions in treatment access, supply chains, and health data systems amid funding shifts. It underscores how international policy changes directly affect on-the-ground health tech and data systems.
items.summary_zh: 美国削减 HIV 援助后，赞比亚部分地区再度出现艾滋病相关健康挑战，影响治疗获取与健康结局。报道指出治疗获取、物资供应链及健康数据系统因资金变动而受影响，凸显国际政策变化对本地健康科技与数据系统的直接影响。

items.title_en: PortalVR Motion – use any VR content in 2D with 3D tracked Joy-Cons
items.title_zh: PortalVR Motion：用追踪 Joy-Cons 将任意 VR 内容在 2D 显示
items.summary_en: PortalVR Motion lets you play VR content in 2D by using 3D-tracked Joy-Cons, enabling broader accessibility and quick prototyping of VR experiences. It demonstrates how motion-tracking peripherals can unlock unconventional display formats and testing workflows.
items.summary_zh: PortalVR Motion 通过 3D 跟踪的 Joy-Cons 让任意 VR 内容在 2D 显示，带来更广泛的可访问性和快速原型测试的可能。此类外设与追踪技术的组合，展示了在显示格式与测试工作流上的创新空间。

items.title_en: RFK Jr. clears path for minors to use tanning beds, much to dermatologist dismay
items.title_zh: RFK Jr. 为未成年人使用日晒浴床铺平道路
items.summary_en: RFK Jr. advocates loosening restrictions on tanning bed use for minors, drawing strong disapproval from dermatologists who warn about skin cancer risk.
items.summary_zh: RFK Jr. 公布一项主张，试图放宽未成年人使用日晒浴床的限制，皮肤科医生对此表示强烈反对，警示皮肤癌风险。

items.title_en: Rolling the Root Key
items.title_zh: 滚动根密钥
items.summary_en: APNIC discusses the rationale and workflow for rotating the root signing key, a high-stakes operation that underpins DNSSEC trust.
items.summary_zh: APNIC 讲述了轮换根签名密钥的原因与流程，这是支撑 DNSSEC 信任的高风险操作。文章解释了为何密钥轮换重要、实施要点以及如何通过自动化降低过程中的风险。

items.title_en: Roadside Attraction
items.title_zh: Show HN：路边景点
items.summary_en: A reflective essay examining roadside attractions as modern myths, exploring how they shape travel culture, memory, and perception of place.
items.summary_zh: 本文对路边景点这一文化现象进行反思，探讨它们如何成为现代神话、塑造旅行文化、记忆与地点感知。

items.title_en: Building the deployment tool I wish I had
items.title_zh: 打造我一直想要的部署工具
items.summary_en: The author shares building a deployment tool tailored to their needs, highlighting practical workflows, repeatability, and failures with existing solutions. The piece offers pragmatic guidance for teams looking to streamline releases and reduce toil.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享打造符合自身需求的部署工具，强调实际工作流、可重复性，以及对现有方案的局限。为寻求简化发布、降低工作负担的团队提供实用建议。

items.title_en: Printing Blogs
items.title_zh: 打印博客
items.summary_en: Guidance on how to turn blog content into printable formats, preserving readability and links. It covers approaches for archiving, typography, and layout when exporting online writing to print, enabling readers to enjoy content offline.
items.summary_zh: 介绍将博客内容转换成可打印格式的方法，强调可读性与链接的保留。涵盖导出、排版与布局等要点，让读者在离线时也能享受这些作品。

items.title_en: Show HN: GETadb.com – every GET request creates a DB
items.title_zh: Show HN：GETadb.com——每个 GET 请求都会创建一个数据库
items.summary_en: GETadb.com is a tiny service that records every HTTP GET request as a database row, enabling instant, auditable traces of visited routes. The idea showcases how simple endpoints can enable powerful visibility into web traffic and can inspire lightweight observability tooling.
items.summary_zh: GETadb.com 是一个小型服务，通过将每次 HTTP GET 请求写入数据库实现对访问路径的可审计追踪，展示了简单端点也能带来强大的可观测性，并可能成为轻量级观测工具的灵感。

items.title_en: The ROKR wooden typewriter: a closer look
items.title_zh: ROKR 木质打字机：深入解析
items.summary_en: A closer look at the ROKR wooden typewriter, analyzing its mechanical design, construction quality, and how vintage typing aesthetics translate into modern tooling or collector appeal.
items.summary_zh: 对 ROKR 木质打字机进行近距离评测，分析其机械结构与做工，以及复古打字美学在现代工具或收藏品中的表现。

items.title_en: The mechanical latching memory of an adhesive tape
items.title_zh: 粘胶带的机械锁存记忆
items.summary_en: An experimental study demonstrates a mechanical latching memory mechanism using adhesive tape materials, offering a low-cost path toward reversible data storage and novel memory physics.
items.summary_zh: 一项实验研究展示了利用粘胶带材料实现的机械锁存记忆机制，为低成本的可逆数据存储和新型记忆物理提供了可能。

items.title_en: Adding a feature to a closed-source app
items.title_zh: 为闭源应用添加新功能
items.summary_en: Extending functionality in closed-source apps raises questions about security, compatibility, and licensing. The post weighs trade-offs between vendor control and user needs, highlighting engineering and business risk.
items.summary_zh: 在闭源应用中添加新功能涉及安全、兼容性和许可等权衡。该文讨论了厂商控制与用户需求之间的取舍，凸显产品演进与授权策略之间的张力。

items.title_en: Show HN: I Built a Museum Exhibit
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个博物馆展品
items.summary_en: Show HN: I built a museum exhibit, detailing the hardware-software stack, build process, and lessons learned for creating engaging, public-facing tech installations.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：我做了一个博物馆展品，介绍了硬件与软件的整合、搭建过程以及对公众互动的经验教训，为志愿者和爱好者搭建公共科技展示提供实用指引。

items.title_en: The Struggle Is Gone
items.title_zh: 挣扎已成过去
items.summary_en: A reflective piece about moving past struggle, outlining a calmer, more efficient workflow that helps developers progress faster and with less friction.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于摆脱挣扎、采用更平静高效工作流的反思性文章，阐述如何让开发者更快地取得进展并减少阻力。

items.title_en: BLAS, Lapack and OpenMP
items.title_zh: BLAS、LAPACK 与 OpenMP
items.summary_en: Native dependencies like BLAS, LAPACK, and OpenMP influence Python science stacks; the article outlines challenges and strategies for compiling and linking these libraries across platforms, impacting performance and portability.
items.summary_zh: BLAS、LAPACK 与 OpenMP 在 Python 科学计算栈中举足轻重，本文概述跨平台编译与链接这些本地依赖所面临的挑战与应对策略，直接影响性能与可移植性。

items.title_en: While the King Lives: An Old C Programming Prank in GNU Hello from 1993
items.title_zh: 当国王还在时：GNU Hello 1993 年的老 C 编程恶作剧
items.summary_en: The extended predicative Mahlo universe in Martin-Löf type theory (2023)
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1993 年 GNU Hello 的一个老式 C 编程恶作剧，展示开源社区的幽默与对跨平台兼容性的关注。

items.title_en: The extended predicative Mahlo universe in Martin-Löf type theory (2023)
items.title_zh: Martin-Löf 类型理论中的扩展可预测 Mahlo 宇（2023）
items.summary_en: The extended predicative Mahlo universe in Martin-Löf type theory surveys a sophisticated universe construction and its implications for foundations of mathematics and constructive verification. The work informs how type-theoretic universes can encode large-cardinal-like structures and influence formal proof systems.
items.summary_zh: 对 Martin-Löf 型理论中扩展的可预测 Mahlo 宇进行讨论，涉及基础数学与构造性验证的影响。该研究揭示类型理论宇宙如何编码类似大基数的结构并影响形式化证明系统。

items.title_en: Show HN: Stage CLI – An easier way of reading your AI generated changes locally
items.title_zh: Show HN：Stage CLI —— 本地更易查看 AI 生成的变更
items.summary_en: Stage CLI provides a streamlined way to inspect changes proposed or generated by AI, directly in your local environment. It helps developers review lineage, diffs, and rationale without sending code to remote services.
items.summary_zh: Stage CLI 提供一种在本地环境中更直观查看 AI 生成变更的简化工具，方便开发者审阅变更的来龙去脉、差异与理由，避免将代码发送到远程服务。

items.title_en: Easy Random Trees
items.title_zh: 简单随机树入门
items.summary_en: A practical guide to creating and using random trees for experiments in algorithms or ML, with approachable examples and tips for evaluating performance. The post shows how randomness can illuminate behavior of tree-based models and data structures.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍如何构建和使用随机树，适用于算法或机器学习的实验，配有易懂的示例与性能评估技巧。通过随机性来揭示树模型与数据结构的行为特征。

items.title_en: HantaWatch Real time hantavirus outbreak tracker
items.title_zh: HantaWatch 实时汉坦病毒疫情追踪器
items.summary_en: HantaWatch provides a real-time hantavirus outbreak tracker, aggregating case data and visualizing spread patterns. The tool supports researchers and public health officials with timely insights into outbreak dynamics and regional risk.
items.summary_zh: HantaWatch 提供实时汉坦病毒疫情追踪，聚合病例数据并可视化传播态势，为研究者和公共卫生官员提供关于疫情动态与区域风险的及时洞察。

items.title_en: Simulating Cells Fighting to the Death
items.title_zh: 细胞互相厮杀的仿真
items.summary_en: Simulating Cells Fighting to the Death presents a lightweight, approachable cellular combat model, illustrating immune interactions or competitive dynamics with simple tools. The project demonstrates how accessible simulations can illuminate biology and emergent behavior.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个简单工具实现的细胞对抗仿真，揭示免疫互动或竞争性动力学的要点，具备教育与研究演示价值。

items.title_en: Why modern parents feel more sleep deprived than our ancestors did
items.title_zh: 现代父母为何比祖辈更易感到睡眠不足
items.summary_en: Modern parenting comes with around-the-clock connectivity, unpredictable infant sleep patterns, and heightened social expectations, all of which erode nightly rest. Researchers point to circadian disruption from screens, work culture, and sleep debt carried across generations as a driver. The story matters for developers of parenting tech and designers of workplaces that support caregivers, as sleep shapes cognitive function, mood, and long-term health.
items.summary_zh: 现代育儿伴随着24小时连接、不可预测的婴儿睡眠模式和更高的社会期望，导致夜间休息被侵蚀。研究指出屏幕引发的昼夜节律干扰、工作文化和跨代累积的睡眠债务，是睡眠不足的关键因素。这一议题对育儿科技开发者和为照护者设计工作场所的人尤为重要，因为睡眠状况直接影响认知功能、情绪与长期健康。

items.title_en: Apple is enforcing an old App Store rule against a new kind of software
items.title_zh: 苹果对新型软件执行老规则
items.summary_en: Apple is applying an old App Store rule to a new software model, constraining apps that rely on wrappers or interpreters to download code at runtime. The move suggests Apple maintains strict controls on how code can be loaded and executed within apps, impacting developers exploring new distribution patterns.
items.summary_zh: 苹果对新型软件模型执行长期存在的 App Store 规则，针对依赖包装器或运行时下载代码的应用。此举表明苹果对应用内代码加载与执行的规则保持严格，或对探索新型分发模式的开发者带来影响。

items.title_en: I have seen the dystopian future of elderly care
items.title_zh: 我已看到养老照护的反乌托邦未来
items.summary_en: An article analyzing Japan's use of Airec robots for elder care, highlighting privacy concerns, potential dehumanization, and policy implications as automation scales in caregiving.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章分析日本在养老照护中使用 Airec 机器人所带来的隐私问题、可能的去人性化风险，以及随着护理自动化扩张对政策的影响。

items.title_en: Some kids are bypassing age verification checks with a fake mustache
items.title_zh: 一些孩子用假胡子绕过年龄验证
items.summary_en: Some kids are bypassing age gates by using a fake mustache to trick visual checks. The report highlights how superficial verification methods can be easily fooled and underscores the need for stronger, multi-factor safeguards on platforms that restrict age-restricted content. The takeaway: age verification remains a vulnerability and requires more robust, privacy-conscious design.
items.summary_zh: 一些孩子用假胡子骗过年龄验证，暴露了基于视觉的简单检查的薄弱。报道强调此类验证的易被欺骗，并呼吁在限制年龄内容的平台引入更强的多因素防护。核心要点是：年龄识别仍是个漏洞，需要更稳健且注重隐私的设计。

items.title_en: Mythos is the best cybersecurity news in a decade
items.title_zh: Mythos：十年来最好的网络安全新闻
items.summary_en: An opinion piece arguing that Mythos has become the standout source for cybersecurity coverage over the last decade. It credits Mythos with rigorous investigations, timely updates on AI-driven threats, and clear signal amid a noisy media landscape. The piece suggests readers should rely on Mythos for deeper, more actionable security insights.
items.summary_zh: 作者認為 Mythos 在過去十年成為最具影響力的網安資訊來源，超越同類媒體。文中點名其嚴謹的調查、及時的 AI 威脅更新，以及在嘈雜的資訊環境中提供清晰的重點，對讀者的安全決策具有實際價值。

items.title_en: Let Me Convince You to Be Prolific
items.title_zh: 让我说服你变得高产
items.summary_en: The essay argues for a culture of prolific writing and creation, highlighting benefits like building a portfolio, reinforcing ideas, and gaining momentum in one’s career. It also addresses tradeoffs with quality and sustainability.
items.summary_zh: 本文主张培养高产创作的文化，强调积累作品、巩固观点以及职业发展的势头等好处，同时探讨产量与质量、可持续性之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Energy Prices Are Driving Demand for Solar Panels and Heat Pumps
items.title_zh: 能源价格推动太阳能与热泵需求
items.summary_en: Rising energy prices are fueling demand for solar panels and heat pumps, as households and businesses seek energy independence and efficiency, with implications for markets and policy.
items.summary_zh: 能源价格上涨推动家庭与企业对太阳能板和热泵的需求增长，推动能源独立与高效系统的采用，同时影响市场与相关政策走向。

items.title_en: "openai.com" was once the personal homepage of a guy named glenn
items.title_zh: openai.com 曾是名为 Glenn 的个人主页
items.summary_en: A look into the OpenAI domain’s past, revealing that it once belonged to a person named Glenn, illustrating how domain history can intersect with branding and the origins of a major AI project.
items.summary_zh: 揭示 OpenAI 域名的早期历史，原来曾属于名为 Glenn 的个人主页，展示域名演变与品牌创始阶段的趣味联系。

items.title_en: MIT’s virtual violin offers luthiers a new design tool
items.title_zh: MIT 的虚拟小提琴为制琴师提供新设计工具
items.summary_en: MIT unveils a virtual violin design tool that lets luthiers explore geometry and acoustics before building physical prototypes. The tool accelerates iteration, helps compare wood choices and resonant cavity shapes, and illustrates how digital modeling can transform traditional craft.
items.summary_zh: MIT 推出一款虛擬小提琴設計工具，讓制琴師在動手製作前就能測試音色與共鳴特性。透過數位建模，設計迭代速度更快，能比較木材、共鳴箱與琴橋等變化對音色的影響，顯示數字設計在傳統工藝中的應用前景。

items.title_en: Three-Em Dash
items.title_zh: 三重破折号
items.summary_en: An exploration of the Unicode Three-Em Dash character, its typography use, and implications for text processing, fonts, and search indexing.
items.summary_zh: 解读 Unicode 的三重破折号字符及其在排版、字体与文本处理、搜索索引中的应用与影响。

items.title_en: Solar on canals reduces water evaporation by 70% and algae growth by 85%
items.title_zh: 运河上太阳能板降低蒸发和藻类生长
items.summary_en: Solar canopies installed on canal networks deliver renewable power while reducing water evaporation by about 70% and algae growth by about 85%, providing a dual-use infrastructure solution. The approach demonstrates scalable benefits for climate resilience and water management.
items.summary_zh: 在运河网络上安装的太阳能顶篷在提供清洁能源的同时，将水蒸发量约降低70%、藻类生长约减少85%，实现了双用途基础设施。此做法展示了在气候韧性与水资源管理方面的可扩展收益。

items.title_en: Egg Intake and the Incidence of Alzheimer's Disease in Adventist Health Study-2
items.title_zh: 安息日健康研究2中的蛋类摄入与阿尔茨海默病发病率关系
items.summary_en: Report from Adventist Health Study-2 on egg consumption and Alzheimer's disease incidence, noting associations and the caveats about causality and confounding dietary patterns.
items.summary_zh: 来自安息日健康研究2的研究报告显示蛋类摄入与阿尔茨海默病发病率之间存在相关性，但强调相关性不等于因果关系，并需考虑饮食模式的混杂因素。

items.title_en: Feds Fine Durham Energy Efficiency Co $722M
items.title_zh: 联邦监管机构对 Durham 能效公司罚款 7.22 亿美元
items.summary_en: Federal regulators fined Durham Energy Efficiency $722 million over alleged compliance issues in an energy efficiency program. The case underscores the importance of accurate efficiency claims and the regulatory risk faced program implementers, with implications for future incentives.
items.summary_zh: 联邦监管机构对 Durham 能效公司处以 7.22 亿美元罚款，源于对能效项目合规性与声明真实性的质疑。此案凸显准确宣称效果的重要性，以及项目实施方在未来激励措施中的监管风险。

items.title_en: Human typing habits and token counts
items.title_zh: 人类打字习惯与令牌数量
items.summary_en: Analyzes how human typing habits map to token counts in prompts and model inputs, offering practical guidance on prompting efficiency and cost control. Highlights the gap between perception of length and actual token usage in LLM workflows.
items.summary_zh: 分析人类打字习惯与提示、输入中的令牌数量之间的关系，为提升提示效率和成本控制提供实用建议。指出感知长度与实际令牌数量之间的差异，以及在 LLM 工作流中的应用要点。

items.title_en: We programmed a program to program new programs (2011)
items.title_zh: 我们编程了一个程序去编程新程序（2011）
items.summary_en: A nostalgic webcomic illustrating a meta-programming joke: a program that writes programs, which in turn write other programs. Highlights how recursion and self-reference appear in programming humor and thought experiments about automation.
items.summary_zh: 这幅漫画以元编程为梗，描绘一个程序用来写新的程序，形成自指与递归的幽默情景。体现了自动化、自我改写在程序设计领域的长期趣味与思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: Adam – An embeddable cross-platform AI agent library
items.title_zh: Show HN: Adam — 一个可嵌入的跨平台 AI 代理库
items.summary_en: Adam is an embeddable AI agent library designed for cross-platform use, enabling developers to ship autonomous agents inside their apps. It emphasizes lightweight integration, tooling for agents, and a plugin-friendly architecture.
items.summary_zh: Adam 是一个可嵌入的跨平台人工智能代理库，便于开发者在应用中集成自主代理。强调轻量级集成、代理工具链和插件式架构。

items.title_en: Introduction to Beaver Triples
items.title_zh: Beaver 三元组入门
items.summary_en: An introductory guide to Beaver triples, a cryptographic primitive used for secure multiparty computation to enable efficient multiplication of secret shares. The post explains concept, construction, and why Beaver triples matter for privacy-preserving computations.
items.summary_zh: Beaver 三元组是一种用于安全多方计算的加密原语，可高效实现秘密共享下的乘法运算。文中讲解其基本原理、构造方法以及在隐私计算中的应用意义。

items.title_en: Random tie knots (2014)
items.title_zh: 2014 年的随机领带结集合
items.summary_en: A 2014 collection of random tie knots, offering varied knot designs and serving as a playful reference for knot enthusiasts and design-minded readers.
items.summary_zh: 2014 年的随机领带结集合，提供多种打结示例，风格趣味十足。对于爱好打结的设计师或寻求灵感的读者而言，是一个轻松的参考素材。

items.title_en: Show HN: Free tool to mark points and polygon regions
items.title_zh: Show HN：免费标记点和多边形区域的工具
items.summary_en: Free tool for marking points and polygon regions on images enables rapid labeling for computer vision datasets. It supports polygonal and point annotations with a lightweight UI and export options tailored for ML pipelines. A handy option for quick prototyping and smaller labeling tasks.
items.summary_zh: 一个免费工具，能在图片上标记点和多边形区域，便于快速为计算机视觉数据集进行标注。它支持多边形和点注释，界面简洁并提供面向机器学习工作流的导出选项，适合快速原型开发和小型标注任务。

items.title_en: CAD and Cam Applications on HP-UX Unix Workstations
items.title_zh: HP-UX UNIX 工作站上的 CAD 与 CAM 应用
items.summary_en: A historical look at CAD and CAM software running on HP-UX workstations, illustrating engineering workflows of the era, performance, and hardware interplay.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在 HP-UX UNIX 工作站上运行的 CAD/CAM 应用，展示当时的工程工作流程、性能特征以及与硬件的协同关系。

items.title_en: 7 lines of code, 3 minutes: Implement a programming language (2010)
items.title_zh: 7 行代码，3 分钟实现一门编程语言（2010）
items.summary_en: A concise retrospective on a 2010 piece showing how a tiny code footprint can implement a programming language, highlighting core steps like lexing, parsing, and interpretation. The takeaway is that a minimal, well-structured approach can illuminate language design for learners and educators.
items.summary_zh: 对2010年一篇文章的简要回顾，展示用极少的代码就能实现一门编程语言的核心要点，涵盖词法分析、语法分析与解释执行等。核心思想是以最小化、结构清晰的方式揭示语言设计的本质，便于学习与教学。

items.title_en: The IT Productivity Paradox
items.title_zh: IT 生产力悖论
items.summary_en: This exploration delves into the IT productivity paradox—the disconnect between IT spending and measured productivity gains. It covers measurement challenges, evolving IT value, and how to better quantify impact.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨 IT 生产力悖论，即 IT 投入与生产力提升之间的错配，分析衡量挑战、IT 价值的演变以及如何更准确地量化影响。

items.title_en: Defeating Works by Design's Unpickable Lock [video]
items.title_zh: 破解 Works by Design 的“不可解锁”锁 [视频]
items.summary_en: A video demonstration challenges a puzzle-like lock marketed as unpickable, illustrating how design choices can be bypassed with clever reasoning or tooling. The content offers lessons on security-by-obscurity vs. verifiable robustness and the importance of rigorous testing.
items.summary_zh: 视频演示挑战一个被标榜为“不可解锁”的锁，展示通过巧妙推理或工具绕过设计选择的可能性。内容强调“以花招掩盖安全性”与可验证鲁棒性之间的取舍，以及严格测试的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: adamsreview – better multi-agent PR reviews for Claude Code
items.title_zh: Show HN: adamsreview — 为 Claude Code 提供更好的多代理 PR 审查
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces AdamsReview, a tool that coordinates multiple AI agents to review Claude Code pull requests, improving review quality and speed. It demonstrates a practical multi-agent workflow for AI-assisted coding.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 AdamsReview，它能协调多位 AI 代理对 Claude Code 的 PR 进行审查，提升审阅质量与速度，展示了 AI 辅助编码的多代理工作流的可行性。

items.title_en: Nuke All Routers
items.title_zh: 清空所有路由器的工具
items.summary_en: A project presenting a tool to deauthenticate routers, raising ethical and legal questions and underscoring the importance of responsible security research.
items.summary_zh: 一个用于对路由器执行去认证的工具项目，提出伦理与法律问题，同时强调负责任的安全研究的重要性。

items.title_en: From Buffon's Needle to Buffon's Noodle
items.title_zh: 从布丰针到布丰面条
items.summary_en: Expands Buffon’s needle idea into an approachable noodle-based experiment, showing how simple probabilistic reasoning can yield elegant estimates for pi. The piece blends math history with hands-on exploration to teach geometry and randomness.
items.summary_zh: 将布丰针问题的思路用于用面条进行的直观实验，展示简单的概率推理如何给出对圆周率的优美估算。文章将数学史与动手探究结合，帮助读者理解几何与随机性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Create flashcards with Space CLI
items.title_zh: Show HN：使用 Space CLI 创建抽认卡
items.summary_en: A Show HN introducing a Space CLI tool to create flashcards, enabling quick, local-first study workflows. It highlights a lightweight, scriptable approach to spaced repetition content management.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍了 Space CLI 制作抽认卡的工具，支持快速、本地优先的学习工作流。该项目展示了一个轻量级、可脚本化的分布式复习内容管理方案，适合自学者使用。

items.title_en: Dirty Frag: Universal Linux LPE
items.title_zh: Dirty Frag：通用的 Linux 本地提权漏洞
items.summary_en: Introducing Dirty Frag, a demonstration of a universal Linux local privilege escalation technique, illustrating how flexible bug chaining can yield root access from unprivileged code. The work underlines persistent kernel vulnerabilities and the need for hardened kernel configs, prompt patches, and defense-in-depth in Linux deployments.
items.summary_zh: Dirty Frag 展示了一种通用的 Linux 本地提权技术，演示了如何通过漏洞链从普通用户获得 root。该工作凸显了内核层漏洞的持续风险，强调在 Linux 系统中需要更强的内核加固、及时修补与防御深度。

items.title_en: Immer: Immutability the easy way (2018)
items.title_zh: Immer：让不可变性更简单（2018）
items.summary_en: Immer provides a simple way to work with immutable state in JavaScript by letting you write code that mutates a draft state, while producing an immutable next state automatically. This reduces boilerplate in state management (e.g., Redux) and improves DX, but introduces some runtime cost and caveats about end-state stability.
items.summary_zh: Immer 通过在草稿状态上进行变更并自动生成不可变的下一状态，为 JavaScript 的不可变数据提供了简便路径。它能显著减少状态管理中的样板代码、提升开发体验，但也带来一定的运行时成本与对最终状态稳定性的注意事项。

items.title_en: Judge rules DOGE cancellation of humanities grants was unconstitutional
items.title_zh: 法官裁定 DOGE 取消人文类拨款被判违宪
items.summary_en: A court ruled that the DOGE's cancellation of humanities grants was unconstitutional, potentially requiring restoration of funding and setting a precedent on public or quasi-public funding decisions. The decision invites scrutiny of political interference in arts and humanities funding and how such actions can face legal challenges.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定 DOGE 取消人文类拨款的行为违宪，可能要求恢复拨款并对公共资金决策设立先例。此判决引发对政治干预艺术与人文资助的审视，以及此类举动如何面临法律挑战。

items.title_en: Four stable kernels with partial fixes for Dirty Frag
items.title_zh: 四个稳定内核对 Dirty Frag 的部分修复
items.summary_en: The kernel maintainers released four stable builds with partial fixes for a vulnerability nicknamed Dirty Frag. The patches reduce exposure, but a full fix may come in later updates; users should stay current.
items.summary_zh: 内核维护者推出四个稳定版本，包含对名为 Dirty Frag 的漏洞的部分修复。这些修补降低了风险，但完整修复可能在后续更新中发布，用户应保持更新。

items.title_en: Boosting multimodal inference performance by >10% with a single Python dict
items.title_zh: 仅用一个 Python 字典提升多模态推理性能超 10%
items.summary_en: A single Python dictionary can yield more than 10% gains in multimodal inference, illustrating how lightweight data organization and caching strategies can unlock meaningful efficiency. The takeaway for ML engineers is that small, clever data-structuring tweaks can complement hardware and model optimizations.
items.summary_zh: 用一个 Python 字典就能让多模态推理性能提升超过 10%，体现了数据组织与缓存策略对性能的直接影响。对 ML 工程师而言，微小但巧妙的数据结构优化可与硬件及模型优化形成协同效应。

items.title_en: The Atari 800 – By Paul Lefebvre
items.title_zh: Atari 800 – 作者 Paul Lefebvre
items.summary_en: Paul Lefebvre's piece on the Atari 800 delves into its hardware, design decisions, and historical significance in early home computing. It offers retro insights that resonate with modern hardware enthusiasts and software preservation.
items.summary_zh: Paul Lefebvre 的文章带你回顾 Atari 800 的硬件结构、设计选择及其在早期家庭计算中的重要性。内容结合怀旧与对现代硬件爱好者及软件保护的启示。

items.title_en: Poka-Yoke
items.title_zh: Poka‑Yoke：防错设计的艺术
items.summary_en: Poka-yoke introduces simple, domain-specific safeguards to prevent human error in manufacturing and design. In software and UX, the principle translates to lockouts, validation, and fail-safes that reduce mistakes before they happen.
items.summary_zh: Poka‑Yoke 强调通过简单的、领域特定的防错设计来防止人为错误。在软件与用户体验中，这一原则被转化为锁定、校验与容错等手段，以在错误发生前降低风险。
